## Accessibility Permission

> This is the most common cause of Hushboard not working. Please check before filing.

- [ ] I have granted Hushboard **Accessibility** access in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility
- [ ] Hushboard appears in that list and its toggle is **on**
- [ ] I relaunched Hushboard after granting access

---

A clear description of what is happening and what you expected to happen.

## Environment

- **macOS version:** (e.g. macOS 15.2 Sequoia)
- **Hushboard version:** (visible in the menu bar popover)
- **Mac model:** (e.g. MacBook Pro M3)
- **Microphone in use:** (e.g. Built-in, AirPods, USB headset)
- **Meeting app:** (e.g. Zoom, Google Meet in Chrome, Teams)

## What you see

Describe or paste any error messages, unexpected behavior, or attach a screenshot.
